job_summary: A Field CRA conducts on-site monitoring visits at clinical trial sites, ensuring protocol compliance and data accuracy.
key_responsibilities: Travel to investigator sites for monitoring visits
Verify source data and patient records
Ensure site compliance with protocols and regulations
Train site staff and resolve operational issues
career_path: Field CRA → Senior CRA → Lead CRA
skills_required: ensure site compliance with protocols and regulations
train site staff and resolve operational issues
verify source data and patient records
